# OSS Labs

> A community of open source engineers building developer tools together.

## Site

- [Home](https://ossl.dev)
- [Projects](https://ossl.dev/projects)
- [About](https://ossl.dev/about)

## Projects

- [genesis](https://github.com/ossl-dev/genesis): Declarative, cross-platform developer environment provisioning engine. TypeScript.
- [zinc](https://zinc.ossl.dev): Universal Shared Memory. Fast, cross-language memory sharing. Rust.
- [pylon](https://github.com/ossl-dev/pylon): Dead simple API versioning. TypeScript.

## Community

- [GitHub](https://github.com/ossl-dev)
- [Discussions](https://github.com/ossl-dev/discussions)

## Optional

- [Full documentation](https://ossl.dev/llms-full.txt): Detailed project info and community docs for LLM context.
- [Sitemap](https://ossl.dev/sitemap.xml): Full site structure.
